ModMetaData.name: BattIePatch: Better Morbid Recon Helmet
ModMetaData.author: BattIeBear
ModMetaData.description:
V1.6
A very small mod that fixes just how goofy the Morbid Recon Helmet looks. All it does is make the helmet's eye holes opaque, which makes it look much more like a helmet and less like a mask.
This is purely a visual change and does not affect the helmet's stats or functionality in any way.
